THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAMOS JR., MILTON ALEXANDER SF# 653943 IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF'S OFFICE BARRED PER CAL. GOVT. C. $945.6. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
